content_body: Project Chimps Sanctuary is dedicated to providing a safe and loving home for retired research chimpanzees. This 236-acre sanctuary offers a natural and enriching environment where the chimps can roam, socialize, and enjoy their freedom. The dedicated team at Project Chimps works tirelessly to ensure the well-being and happiness of each resident, providing excellent care and creating opportunities for the chimps to thrive. Visitors can learn about the sanctuary's mission, the individual stories of the chimps, and the importance of conservation through educational tours and events. Explore the many hiking trails they have on the property, and you might just see a chimp on your stroll! Project Chimps Sanctuary is a beacon of hope and compassion, advocating for the welfare and dignity of these incredible animals.
title: Project Chimps Sanctuary
